case_title: MCEVOY, BRIAN et al VS WOOSTER, VAUGHN

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,771.78 FILED BY MCEVOY, BRIAN TEXMAR, COMMON PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT WOOSTER, VAUGHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,311.00 FILED BY WOOSTER, VAUGHN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MCEVOY, BRIAN TEXMAR, COMMON PARTNERSHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WOOSTER, VAUGHN
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO BRIAN MCEVOY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WOOSTER, VAUGHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MCEVOY, BRIAN TEXMAR, COMMON PARTNERSHIP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCEVOY, BRIAN TEXMAR, COMMON PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOOSTER, VAUGHN $224.63 PRINCIPAL, $109.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $333.63, THE COURT DETERMINES PERMISSABLE DEDUCTIONS PLUS DAMAGES TO BE $2784.63. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO A CREDIT OF $2560 FOR HIS SECURITY DEPOSIT PLUS ACCRUED INTEREST. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLFT'S EXHIBITS IN BROWN ALBUM (LARGE DRAWER)
